message:
chore: remove dead code — unused PluginRun type and EscalationState constants

- Remove PluginRun struct from plugin/types.go (never referenced; recording.go
  uses PluginRunRecord and PluginRunBead instead)
- Remove EscalationOpen/EscalationAcked/EscalationClosed constants from
  beads_escalation.go (never referenced outside definition)
- Remove orphaned "time" import from types.go

Closes gt-wndrq, gt-2abltl.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
